title: Galangal and Kha Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic chicken tagine flavored with galangal, kha, and spices, perfect for a cozy dinner. This traditional Moroccan dish is slow-cooked in a clay pot, resulting in tender and juicy chicken.

ingredients.name: moroccan spices
ingredients.notes: use a mix of cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and ginger

instructions: Heat oil in a large clay tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the galangal paste and kha paste and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add the moroccan spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the briny olives and serve hot over couscous or rice.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
